recommended_patch: raw_data_available=Partial; processed_data_available=Yes; controlled_access=Yes/Partial; data_access_status=Public processed data; Controlled access; longitudinal=Partial; usable_for_disease_vs_control=TRUE; usable_for_treatment_response=FALSE; usable_for_longitudinal_analysis=FALSE
notes: GEO says processed data are available, raw data are not provided on GEO, and the submitter points raw FASTQ to dbGaP. dbGaP phs003156.v1.p1 is authorized-access and linked to GSE221161. Baseline RNA-seq only, with mean 6-year clinical follow-up outcomes, so longitudinal is partial/clinical-follow-up-only. Disease-vs-control is supported; treatment-response is not directly supported because outcomes are complications/remission/surgery rather than response to a named therapy.

recommended_patch: data_access_status=Public portal; longitudinal=No; keep raw_data_available=Unclear; keep processed_data_available=Unclear; usable_for_disease_vs_control=TRUE; usable_for_cell_deconvolution=TRUE; usable_for_treatment_response=FALSE
notes: ImmPort public summary confirms SDY1765, UC among conditions, complete descriptive/results status, scRNA-seq of inflamed/non-inflamed tissues, and 84 subjects; DR41 release notes list RNA sequencing assay samples. Direct public raw/processed download URL was not verified from the public page, so raw/processed availability still needs manual review.

recommended_patch: data_access_status=Public raw data; Public processed data; longitudinal=No; keep raw_data_available=Yes; keep processed_data_available=Yes; usable_for_disease_vs_control=TRUE; usable_for_treatment_response=TRUE; usable_for_longitudinal_analysis=FALSE
notes: GEO lists GSE207022 public CEL raw TAR and processed data in the sample table. Samples are rectal biopsy week 0 only; treatment/outcome metadata support treatment-response use, but not longitudinal expression analysis.

recommended_patch: data_access_status=Public processed data; Unclear raw data; longitudinal=Partial; keep raw_data_available=Unclear; keep processed_data_available=Yes; usable_for_disease_vs_control=TRUE; usable_for_treatment_response=FALSE; usable_for_longitudinal_analysis=TRUE
notes: GEO provides non-normalized TXT plus processed sample-table data, but no direct raw array-file package is listed. GEO states active and quiescent UC stages were sampled at the same site in individual UC patients, supporting partial longitudinal/paired-state use.
